# CS2Cap Docs

> Documentation for the CS2Cap CS2 market data API. Use the API Reference and OpenAPI JSON as the canonical machine-readable contract. Prices and bids use indexed data paths and minor currency units.

Use this file as the shortest path to the most useful docs for model-assisted answers. For endpoint details, request/response shapes, and error semantics, prefer the OpenAPI JSON and API Reference over narrative pages.

## Core Documentation

- [Quickstart](https://docs.cs2cap.com/quickstart): First request, authentication setup, and the fastest path to a working integration.
- [API Reference](https://docs.cs2cap.com/api-reference): Full endpoint contracts, parameters, response shapes, rate limits, and error handling.
- [Core Concepts](https://docs.cs2cap.com/core-concepts): Domain vocabulary, minor units, provider terminology, and indexing behavior.
- [Field Reference](https://docs.cs2cap.com/field-reference): Response field semantics and data meanings used across the docs.
- [Pricing](https://docs.cs2cap.com/pricing): API tiers, quotas, and account/billing overview.

## Machine-Readable Contract

- [OpenAPI JSON](https://docs.cs2cap.com/openapi/openapi.json): Canonical public API schema for tools, SDKs, and agents.
